作用机理: treating the perovskite surface with different types of ammonium salts reduces the level of electronic defects present at the interface between the perovskite film and the hole transport layer.
原文原句: We introduce a straightforward strategy to reduce the level of electronic defects present at the interface between the perovskite film and the hole transport layer by treating the perovskite surface with different types of ammonium salts, namely ethylammonium, imidazolium and guanidinium iodide.
